items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Tehran Send Mixed Signals on Emerging Peace Agreement
items.summary: President Trump said it would be signed on Sunday, but Iran’s Foreign Ministry cautioned that the timeline could be slower.

items.title: NDA inches towards two-thirds majority in Rajya Sabha; short in Lok Sabha despite TMC rebellion
items.summary: In the Lok Sabha, however, the NDA's numbers can go up to 213 with around 20 more TMC MPs forming a separate group and supporting it

items.title: ‘Search and rescue being coordinated’: Indian vessel Virat 1 involved in 'incident' off Oman; hunt on for 14 crew members
items.summary: An Indian-flagged vessel, Virat 1, carrying 14 crew members, has been involved in an incident off Oman's coast. Search and rescue operations are actively under way, coordinated...
